mapper.insert: INSERT INTO task_dispatch_queue (task_id, queue_status, priority, next_trigger_time, worker_id, retry_count, fail_reason, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{taskId}, #{queueStatus}, #{priority}, #{nextTriggerTime}, #{workerId}, #{retryCount}, #{failReason}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE task_dispatch_queue SET queue_status = 'running', worker_id = #{workerId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{queueId} AND queue_status IN ('waiting', 'retry_wait')
UPDATE task_dispatch_queue SET queue_status = 'success', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{queueId}
UPDATE task_dispatch_queue SET queue_status = 'failed', fail_reason = #{failReason}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{queueId}

UPDATE task_dispatch_queue SET queue_status = 'retry_wait', retry_count = retry_count + 1, next_trigger_time = #{nextTriggerTime}, fail_reason = #{failReason}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{queueId}
